questions.question: What 1983 movie, set in Tulsa, starred Patrick Swayze, Rob Lowe, C. Thomas Howell, Ralph Macchio, Matt Dillon, Tom Cruise, and Emilio Estevez?
What hungry hero was introduced in arcades in 1980, becoming one of the most popular games in history?
When the song "Na Na Hey Hey Kiss Him Goodbye" was played at sporting events, what did the winning fans do?
questions.answer: Taunted the opposing team by waving their car keys

questions.question: What 14-year-old Romanian gymnast became a star at the 1976 Olympics, winning three gold medals and scoring the first perfect "10" in history?
